name: Can I get fired for filing a workers comp claim after a machine injury?

mainEntity.name: Can I get fired for filing a workers comp claim after a machine injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, it is illegal for an employer to retaliate against you for filing a claim. If you are fired, you may have grounds for a wrongful termination lawsuit alongside your injury claim.
